Divorce Attorney Atlanta GA | Family Lawyer | Debra E Paris, P.C.
My name is Debra E. Paris; I am an attorney at law serving Atlanta, Georgia. I practice all aspects of family law, including divorce, consumer bankruptcy, and juvenile law.
